result:
The work is complete and committed. The `.hublaunch/` untracked dirs are HubLaunch runtime artifacts (gitignored by convention) — not part of the plan deliverables. ``` [RALPH] ✅ MISSION COMPLETE ``` ## Summary Implemented the **Welcome Landing Page with Under Construction Notice** plan in full. **Implemented (all 3 phases):** - `index.html` — HTML5 page: `lang="en"`, viewport meta, `Hula — Coming Soon`, semantic `
` with `

Welcome to Hula

`, an under-construction `
` (🚧 icon `aria-hidden`, "Under Construction" `

`, "…Check back soon." message), and the intent comment. No JS, no external resources. - `styles.css` — CSS reset, centered flex body layout, responsive `rem`/`em` units, amber under-construction banner. - `.github/workflows/pages.yml` — deploys repo root to GitHub Pages on push to `main` (none existed before). **Verification** (no build/lint/type-check tooling exists — this is a plain HTML/CSS greenfield repo, confirmed no `package.json` or config commands): - HTML parsed well-formed, zero unclosed tags. - Acceptance criteria checked programmatically — **all PASS**: AC2 (h1), AC3 (icon + heading + message), AC4 (title), AC6 (no `
